TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Syria u Syria sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 35 00 N, 38 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 185,180 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 183,630 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,550 sq km. hamin nu tademaw sa 17,185,170. kakalukan umah sa 75.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 2.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 21.50%. 1944 a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, pasubana' tu nika isiteked nu binacadan. 1946 a mihcaan sepat bulad pitu a demiad, sululen nu lenhekuo atu hemin hu binacadan a patizeng tiy si-li-ya . tapang ayza mukeliday pa-sa-elÔľéa-say-de , matulin a malais a binacadan, kiwasak sa ayza namalais, makuwan nu mibulibulay na hiza u nisululan a binacadan, si-li-ya a sihu naluyaluyay a paculiay tu sihu atu miculiyenpang nu si-li-ya . tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Damascus. kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 17 bulad 4 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Bashar al-Assad, micakat a demiad sa i 2000 a mihca pitu bulad sabaw pitu a demiad. cunli u cunli nu Syria ayza sa ci Hussein Arnousn , micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 8 bulad 30 demiad. kakitidaan u sela nu si-li-ya 185,180 pin-fang-kung-li , pasuni alawan nu yi-se-liye ke-lan-kaw-ti , i satipan nu ya-cuo-ta-luo , malalutin atu tu-el-ci i saamisan malalutin in sawaliyan atu i-la-ke malutin i satimula tu ye-tan i teban nu satip atu timul, malalutin tu li-pa-nen atu pa-le-se-tan satipan silaed tu ti-cung-hay masasu paengaw atu say-pu-lu-se namaka satipan atu saamisa pasa wali atu timul masalaya a mangangiw. ŚÖ®ŚúčŚŹĮŚąÜÁāļŚõõŚÄčŚúįŚł∂: kapah a palasepaten ku sela nu binacadan . satipan u diheb laed nu tusaay a buyu', pasu 2841 m u satalakaway a buyu' nu binacadan i tebal nu satip atu timul siye-he-san teban nu satip atu amis mililis tu ti-cung-hay a enal 1831 km ku lalaya nu dadipasan u cayay ka adihay nu silutukay a sela. sawalian u makalalumaay talakaway a lala'. teban nu wali atu timu u bunabunakan nu si-li-ya makedal ku demiad nu si-li-ya "śēėŚą©šļě" anu palalimaen misisis ku kakitidaan, tuluay a benis i, cacay a mihcaan tusa badaan izaw ku lima mm tu udad, malawa nu talakaway a buyu'. u lilis nu dadipasan tu saamisan a kakitidaan, u kutiay a demiad nu ti-cung-hay timulan a kakitizaan, u kutiay a bunabunakan, u sidamekay sela, u pitebanan nu binacadan, namaka 1980 a mihca a alingatu, mahica nakamuan a pananum, cayay patuku a mitdas a kakaumahan a sela, i teban nu wali atu amisay "AI Jazira" aut timulay "Hawran" u pitebanan nu kakaumahan. sawaliay a yu-huwa-la-ti-he u tatebanan nu binacadan a sauwac. mamin a kayzaan ku sawali a lala' nu binacadan. tiya makayza i-la-ke a tayzal puo-se-wan nikayzaan nu yu-huwa-la-ti-he 15 a binacadan, u sasakamuan ku kapahay ku nikaudip atipan a diheb i zaw ku a-si-he makayza i tu-el-ci a micumdi ti-cung-hay teban nu sati atu timu nu binacadan u tapang a tukay tay-ma-se-ke saamisanay a-le-puo atu huwo-mu-se u pitebanan a tukay nu si-li-ya a luma' a tukay mililis amin i dadipasa. singciw ayzaay a si-li-ya u i-se-lan-ciyaw ku tebanan a misinziya, mu-se-lin a tademaw 90%, 70% a tademaw u san-ni-pay kumud nu se-ye-pay maka 20%, se-ye-pay sibenis hen tu a-la-way-pay se-el-i-ma-mu-pay atu i-se-ma-yi-pay . matenesay tu ku laylay nu ciwlu nu si-li-ya , na u ciwlu a binacadan ku si-li-ya malingatu a idebung mikuwan ku baluhayay a i-se-lan-ciyaw maka ala tu 1000 a mihca, aluman ku misiziyaay nu si-li-ya tademaw tu ciwlu , nika ayza 100 a mihca malalais anabulaw tayza nutawan a binacadan, cayay tu kalecuh tu atungay, u misinziya tu ciwlu a tademaw mabulaw tu ayaytu ka adihay ku tademaw i binacadan, 10% tu ku tademaw u miciwluay nu si-li-ya . nika sibunawan han nu sihu ku misinziyaay tu ciwlu a tademaw. i niyazu' nu micuwluay a tademaw nu si-li-ya nu ukasi a-la-mi-i hen ku kamuen, luma' u ya-ce-di Te-lu-ce a misinziyaay atu dadaay a yu-tay a tademaw. laylay 2000 mihcaan 6 bulad 9 demiad, mapatay ku pamikuwanay 30 a mihca ci ha-fye-ceÔľéa -say-de saka tusa a wawa 'a-sa-elÔľéa -say-de mala satapangay nu binacadan. 7 a bulad 17 a demiad a alingatu. 2005 mihica 4 bulad 26 demiadmiduduc tu nalahecian nu liyen-he-kuo ku si-li-ya , manukas ku hitay namaka li-pa-nen masatelep mamilangat midebung tu li-pa-nen . 2007a mihcaan lima a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku sepat misingkiw tu saka tusa nu piut a mihca a mala satapangay nu binacadan, 97.62% ku misuluay a mala satapangay tangasa 2014 mihca. 2011/1/26 cung-tung a kakitizaan a binacadan macacengan u a-la-puo-ce-cung a kawaw, malingatu a simibulibulay tu sihu nu si-li-ya nika mapenec tu nu sihu. uyza mibulibulay tu sihu a tademaw malalais ayza atu sihu. 2013ŚĻī8śúą, (Barack Obama) . 2013/8 u huwa-siye-u-ci ku sapipenec ni a-say-de tu binawlan nu nikuwanan niza mala salaecusay sakatalay ku balucu' niza i 21 se-ci nipihiza nizamibabelin tu nabalucuan nu tapang nu a-mi-li-ka ci u-pa-ma, malawit ku nihemheman nu balucu', nika cayay saybangi nu hitay nu huwa-fu, maselel ku nipalakapah tu a-mi-li-ka . 2015/9 midebung a miculuk ku hitay nu el-luo-se padamaan aca nu yi-lang mahizatu u sisapikpikay a tula' ci a-say-de malalaisay a kawaw nu labu nu si-li-ya malahic tu. 2015ŚĻī5śúą," . 2015/5 yi-se-lan-kuo a masakaputay militawal tu nikalais nu labu nu binacadan nu si-li-ya matulin a micalap tu sela nu si-li-ya ayza maselep ku icelang nu yi-se-lan-kuo i si-li-ya nika cuwacuwaay a hitay nu si-li-ya . macacalaphen tu sela nu binacada, ayza nicalapan nu yi-se-lan-kuo tu sela nu si-li-ya , manunultu a alawan nu hitay nu sihu nu si-li-ya micaculiay tu sihu a hitay, ku-el-de a masakaputay tamedaw. 2019 (Idlib), . wamamalasawad ku 2019 a mihca, u micaculiay tu sihu a hitay mitalikul tangasa i yi-de-li-pu-sen , lalabaen nu sihu a hitay nu si-li-ya (śēėŚą©šļě, saicelang sa a padama ku el-luo-se atu yi-lang tu hitay nu sihu, 300 a mang ku mapatayay nu maluay i yi-de-li-pu-sen a tademaw. maligatu namalais tangasa ayza satabakiay a nika lalais i labu nu binacadan satabakiyay a mihinang nu binawlan. 360 a mang tu ku nidiputan nu tu-el-ci tu tadema, milalang tu hitay nu sihu nu si-li-ya tu-el-ci "pey-ye-ceng-yen-kuo " sasa milais sa tu el-luo-se . . u tulin a malalais nu si-li-ya atu yi-se-lan-kuo , 20 a mang ku mapatayay nu tademaw, 800 a mang ku mihinangay nu labuay nu binacadan a tademaw, malawit nu tayzaay i nutaw a binacadan mihinang a tademaw. nu saka tusa satabakiay a nikalalais nu sikay, u saalumanay nu mihinangay nu tademaw.

¶ur~…ĺiaj tu sińßu a ńßitaj mitar~…ĺikur~…ĺ taŇčasa i ji-d…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-s…ôn , r~…ĺar~…ĺaba…ôn nu sińßu a ńßitaj nu si-r~…ĺi-ja (***, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa a padama ku …ôr~…ĺ-r~…ĺuo-s…ô atu ji-r~…ĺaŇč tu ńßitaj nu sińßu, *** a maŇč ku mapatajaj nu mar~…ĺuaj i ji-d…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-s…ôn a tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺigatu namar~…ĺais taŇčasa ajza satabakiaj a nika r~…ĺar~…ĺais i r~…ĺabu nu bina ¶adan satabakijaj a mińßinaŇč nu binawr~…ĺan. *** a maŇč tu ku nidiputan nu tu-…ôr~…ĺ- ¶i tu tad…ôma, mir~…ĺar~…ĺaŇč tu ńßitaj nu sińßu nu si-r~…ĺi-ja tu-…ôr~…ĺ- ¶i "p…ô-j…ô- ¶…ôŇč-j…ôn-kuo " sasa mir~…ĺais sa tu …ôr~…ĺ-r~…ĺuo-s…ô . . u tur~…ĺin a mar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu si-r~…ĺi-ja atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-kuo , ** a maŇč ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, *** a maŇč ku mińßinaŇčaj nu r~…ĺabuaj nu bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺawit nu tajzaaj i nutaw a bina ¶adan mińßinaŇč a tad…ômaw. nu saka tusa satabakiaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu sikaj, u saar~…ĺumanaj nu mińßinaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: Syria u Syria sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 35 00 N, 38 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 185,180 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 183,630 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,550 sq km. hamin nu tademaw sa 17,185,170. kakalukan umah sa 75.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 2.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 21.50%. 1944 a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, pasubana' tu nika isiteked nu binacadan. 1946 a mihcaan sepat bulad pitu a demiad, sululen nu lenhekuo atu hemin hu binacadan a patizeng tiy si-li-ya . tapang ayza mukeliday pa-sa-elÔľéa-say-de , matulin a malais a binacadan, kiwasak sa ayza namalais, makuwan nu mibulibulay na hiza u nisululan a binacadan, si-li-ya a sihu naluyaluyay a paculiay tu sihu atu miculiyenpang nu si-li-ya . tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Damascus. kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 17 bulad 4 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Bashar al-Assad, micakat a demiad sa i 2000 a mihca pitu bulad sabaw pitu a demiad. cunli u cunli nu Syria ayza sa ci Hussein Arnousn , micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 8 bulad 30 demiad. kakitidaan u sela nu si-li-ya 185,180 pin-fang-kung-li , pasuni alawan nu yi-se-liye ke-lan-kaw-ti , i satipan nu ya-cuo-ta-luo , malalutin atu tu-el-ci i saamisan malalutin in sawaliyan atu i-la-ke malutin i satimula tu ye-tan i teban nu satip atu timul, malalutin tu li-pa-nen atu pa-le-se-tan satipan silaed tu ti-cung-hay masasu paengaw atu say-pu-lu-se namaka satipan atu saamisa pasa wali atu timul masalaya a mangangiw. ŚÖ®ŚúčŚŹĮŚąÜÁāļŚõõŚÄčŚúįŚł∂: kapah a palasepaten ku sela nu binacadan . satipan u diheb laed nu tusaay a buyu', pasu 2841 m u satalakaway a buyu' nu binacadan i tebal nu satip atu timul siye-he-san teban nu satip atu amis mililis tu ti-cung-hay a enal 1831 km ku lalaya nu dadipasan u cayay ka adihay nu silutukay a sela. sawalian u makalalumaay talakaway a lala'. teban nu wali atu timu u bunabunakan nu si-li-ya makedal ku demiad nu si-li-ya "śēėŚą©šļě" anu palalimaen misisis ku kakitidaan, tuluay a benis i, cacay a mihcaan tusa badaan izaw ku lima mm tu udad, malawa nu talakaway a buyu'. u lilis nu dadipasan tu saamisan a kakitidaan, u kutiay a demiad nu ti-cung-hay timulan a kakitizaan, u kutiay a bunabunakan, u sidamekay sela, u pitebanan nu binacadan, namaka 1980 a mihca a alingatu, mahica nakamuan a pananum, cayay patuku a mitdas a kakaumahan a sela, i teban nu wali atu amisay "AI Jazira" aut timulay "Hawran" u pitebanan nu kakaumahan. sawaliay a yu-huwa-la-ti-he u tatebanan nu binacadan a sauwac. mamin a kayzaan ku sawali a lala' nu binacadan. tiya makayza i-la-ke a tayzal puo-se-wan nikayzaan nu yu-huwa-la-ti-he 15 a binacadan, u sasakamuan ku kapahay ku nikaudip atipan a diheb i zaw ku a-si-he makayza i tu-el-ci a micumdi ti-cung-hay teban nu sati atu timu nu binacadan u tapang a tukay tay-ma-se-ke saamisanay a-le-puo atu huwo-mu-se u pitebanan a tukay nu si-li-ya a luma' a tukay mililis amin i dadipasa. singciw ayzaay a si-li-ya u i-se-lan-ciyaw ku tebanan a misinziya, mu-se-lin a tademaw 90%, 70% a tademaw u san-ni-pay kumud nu se-ye-pay maka 20%, se-ye-pay sibenis hen tu a-la-way-pay se-el-i-ma-mu-pay atu i-se-ma-yi-pay . matenesay tu ku laylay nu ciwlu nu si-li-ya , na u ciwlu a binacadan ku si-li-ya malingatu a idebung mikuwan ku baluhayay a i-se-lan-ciyaw maka ala tu 1000 a mihca, aluman ku misiziyaay nu si-li-ya tademaw tu ciwlu , nika ayza 100 a mihca malalais anabulaw tayza nutawan a binacadan, cayay tu kalecuh tu atungay, u misinziya tu ciwlu a tademaw mabulaw tu ayaytu ka adihay ku tademaw i binacadan, 10% tu ku tademaw u miciwluay nu si-li-ya . nika sibunawan han nu sihu ku misinziyaay tu ciwlu a tademaw. i niyazu' nu micuwluay a tademaw nu si-li-ya nu ukasi a-la-mi-i hen ku kamuen, luma' u ya-ce-di Te-lu-ce a misinziyaay atu dadaay a yu-tay a tademaw. laylay 2000 mihcaan 6 bulad 9 demiad, mapatay ku pamikuwanay 30 a mihca ci ha-fye-ceÔľéa -say-de saka tusa a wawa 'a-sa-elÔľéa -say-de mala satapangay nu binacadan. 7 a bulad 17 a demiad a alingatu. 2005 mihica 4 bulad 26 demiadmiduduc tu nalahecian nu liyen-he-kuo ku si-li-ya , manukas ku hitay namaka li-pa-nen masatelep mamilangat midebung tu li-pa-nen . 2007a mihcaan lima a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku sepat misingkiw tu saka tusa nu piut a mihca a mala satapangay nu binacadan, 97.62% ku misuluay a mala satapangay tangasa 2014 mihca. 2011/1/26 cung-tung a kakitizaan a binacadan macacengan u a-la-puo-ce-cung a kawaw, malingatu a simibulibulay tu sihu nu si-li-ya nika mapenec tu nu sihu. uyza mibulibulay tu sihu a tademaw malalais ayza atu sihu. 2013ŚĻī8śúą, (Barack Obama) . 2013/8 u huwa-siye-u-ci ku sapipenec ni a-say-de tu binawlan nu nikuwanan niza mala salaecusay sakatalay ku balucu' niza i 21 se-ci nipihiza nizamibabelin tu nabalucuan nu tapang nu a-mi-li-ka ci u-pa-ma, malawit ku nihemheman nu balucu', nika cayay saybangi nu hitay nu huwa-fu, maselel ku nipalakapah tu a-mi-li-ka . 2015/9 midebung a miculuk ku hitay nu el-luo-se padamaan aca nu yi-lang mahizatu u sisapikpikay a tula' ci a-say-de malalaisay a kawaw nu labu nu si-li-ya malahic tu. 2015ŚĻī5śúą," . 2015/5 yi-se-lan-kuo a masakaputay militawal tu nikalais nu labu nu binacadan nu si-li-ya matulin a micalap tu sela nu si-li-ya ayza maselep ku icelang nu yi-se-lan-kuo i si-li-ya nika cuwacuwaay a hitay nu si-li-ya . macacalaphen tu sela nu binacada, ayza nicalapan nu yi-se-lan-kuo tu sela nu si-li-ya , manunultu a alawan nu hitay nu sihu nu si-li-ya micaculiay tu sihu a hitay, ku-el-de a masakaputay tamedaw. 2019 (Idlib), . wamamalasawad ku 2019 a mihca, u micaculiay tu sihu a hitay mitalikul tangasa i yi-de-li-pu-sen , lalabaen nu sihu a hitay nu si-li-ya (śēėŚą©šļě, saicelang sa a padama ku el-luo-se atu yi-lang tu hitay nu sihu, 300 a mang ku mapatayay nu maluay i yi-de-li-pu-sen a tademaw. maligatu namalais tangasa ayza satabakiay a nika lalais i labu nu binacadan satabakiyay a mihinang nu binawlan. 360 a mang tu ku nidiputan nu tu-el-ci tu tadema, milalang tu hitay nu sihu nu si-li-ya tu-el-ci "pey-ye-ceng-yen-kuo " sasa milais sa tu el-luo-se . . u tulin a malalais nu si-li-ya atu yi-se-lan-kuo , 20 a mang ku mapatayay nu tademaw, 800 a mang ku mihinangay nu labuay nu binacadan a tademaw, malawit nu tayzaay i nutaw a binacadan mihinang a tademaw. nu saka tusa satabakiay a nikalalais nu sikay, u saalumanay nu mihinangay nu tademaw.

nu tajzaaj i nutaw a bina ¶adan mińßinaŇč a tad…ômaw. nu saka tusa satabakiaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu sikaj, u saar~…ĺumanaj nu mińßinaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw.
